# Vendored: NIC-DMD (Python reference)

Verbatim copy of the Python implementation from
[`Project-NIC/NIC-DMD`](https://github.com/Project-NIC/NIC-DMD) (`main`).

Files:
- `nic_dmd.py` — from `python/nic_dmd.py`
- `LICENSE`

Used by the glue for the optional compression channel.

The public-API name-alignment (`DMD_DELTA_*`, `DMD_ANS_*`) is now part of
upstream, so this is a straight copy of upstream `python/nic_dmd.py`. Refresh
with `python3 tools/sync_vendor.py`; never edit vendored files by hand.
